data.description: Create a chat completion using GPT models (gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo, etc.)

model.label: Model
model.description: The model to use for chat completion

messages.label: Messages
messages.description: Array of message objects for the conversation

maxTokens.label: Max Tokens
maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness (0-2). Lower is more deterministic

actionParams.messages: give a json file about email campain google analytics in this format "{ "emailCampaign": { "name": "Spring Sale Email Campaign", "startDate": "2022-04-01", "endDate": "2022-04-15", "campaignID": "ABC123", "utmSource": "email", "utmMedium": "campaign", "utmCampaign": "spring_sale", "utmContent": "promo_email", "utmTerm": "spring_sale_discount", "metrics": { "sessions": 500, "pageViews": 1000, "uniquePageViews": 800, "averageSessionDuration": "00:02:30", "bounceRate": "30%", "conversionRate": "5%" }, "goals": { "goal1": { "name": "Purchase", "completions": 25, "conversionRate": "5%" }, "goal2": { "name": "Sign up", "completions": 50, "conversionRate": "10%" } }, "ecommerce": { "revenue": "$10,000", "transactions": 50, "averageOrderValue": "$200" } } }"

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness (0-2). Lower is more deterministic

data.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or direct message to a user

text.label: Message Text
text.description: The text content of your message (supports Slack markdown formatting)

threadTs.label: Reply in Thread (Optional)
threadTs.helpText: Leave empty to send as a new message. Use output from previous message node to reply in thread.
threadTs.description: To reply in a thread, provide the timestamp of the parent message

channelId.label: Channel or User ID
channelId.helpText: Right-click on a channel in Slack → View channel details → Copy channel ID
channelId.description: The ID of the channel (starts with C) or user (starts with U) to send the message to

params.label: Run Code

ai_prompt: You need Gmail Trigger to detect incoming campaign emails, then use Google Analytics action to track performance, and finally utilize OpenAI to generate insights. That's 3 nodes total.
